title: Runner v1 agent-step scope: agent steps in v1 vs command/transform/gate-only first
context: Runner v1 agent-step scope: support agent steps in v1 (requires the pi-on-PATH + model-backend pre-flight) vs ship command/transform/gate-only first and add agent support later.
decision: Agent steps in v1. The workflow call leg is an agent step (14 across the sequence); a command/transform/gate-only runner cannot run the workshop. TASK-007 (pi-on-PATH plus model-backend pre-flight) is in scope. Agent dispatch is runtime-verified (A6).
consequences: Gates whether the agent-step pre-flight task is in v1 scope (the conditional task).
